pr.title: Record: SLOT + QK-Gain 4.0 + XSA-11 — val_bpb 0.9462 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Adds SLOT per-sample delta/logit bias tuning atop a VRL+LeakyReLU base with QK-Gain 4.0 and XSA on every layer for eval-time refinement.
techniques: - SLOT per-sequence delta and logit bias optimized at eval with frozen weights
- QK-Gain 4.0 per-head query scaling paired with XSA across all 11 layers
- Score-first eval uses cosine LR schedule and 16 AdamW steps over scored positions
